clientSubDomain.description: Used to invoke the Arkose service from the client application. Request from your Arkose Customer Success Manager or use the default client-api value.

privateKey.description: The private key available on the Arkose Portal. Contact your Arkose Customer Success Manager for assistance with your keys.

publicKey.description: The public key available on the Arkose Portal. Contact your Arkose Customer Success Manager for assistance with your keys.

verifySubDomain.description: Used to invoke the Arkose service from the Microsoft authentication server. Request from your Arkose Customer Success Manager or use the default verify-api value.
